data.title: Coppernico Metals to attend Vancouver Resource Investment Conference 2026 on Jan. 25-26 at Vancouver Convention Centre, Booth #124.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 23, 2026, Coppernico Metals Inc. (TSX: COPR, OTCQB: CPPMF, FSE: 9I3) will be attending the Vancouver Resource Investment Conference on January 25-26, 2026, at the Vancouver Convention Centre located at 1055 Canada Place. The company, also known as Coppernico, is excited to participate in the event and invites investors to meet with their team at Booth #124.

data.title: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust in Hollywood, California, announces the 14th Annual Pebby Award Nominations.
data.description: In Hollywood, California, Pebblebrook Hotel Trust has revealed the nominations for the 14th Annual Pebby Awards. The renowned awards ceremony, recognizing excellence in the Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) sector, highlights outstanding performances in various categories. This year's event features a strong lineup of nominees across different segments, with winners set to be announced at the upcoming ceremony. Stay tuned for updates on this highly anticipated event celebrating achievements within the REIT industry.

data.title: Iron Mountain (NYSE: IRM) releases tax treatment for 2025 distributions on common stock with detailed breakdown.
data.description: Iron Mountain Inc. (NYSE: IRM), a global info management services leader, disclosed tax treatment info for 2025 stock distributions. The details include Form 1099 Box 1a, Box 1b, Box 2a, Box 2b, Box 2f, Box 3, Box 5, Payment Date, Total Distribution, Ordinary Taxable Dividend, Qualified Taxable Dividend (1), Total Capital Gain Distribution, Unrecaptured Sec. 1250 Gain (2), and Section 897 Capi. This announcement outlines how the distributions are categorized for tax purposes.

data.title: Bitcoin is below $90,000 with liquidations at $207.90 million. Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin volatile. ETFs report net outflows. Bitcoin at $89,130.68, Ethereum at $2,934.60, XRP at $1.90, Dogecoin at $0.1251.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is currently below $90,000, with liquidations amounting to $207.90 million in the last 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $32.1 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw net outflows of $41.98 million on Thursday. The current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) at $89,130.68, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) at $2,934.60, Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) at $127.39, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) at $1.90, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) at $0.1251, and Shiba Inu.

data.title: Sanofi plans regulatory filings for Dupixent's successor amlitelimab despite mixed data from pivotal studies, targeting atopic dermatitis treatment. Data shows potential success in moderate-to-severe cases. Study met primary/secondary endpoints, with significant and clinically relevant skin clearance. Financial results from earlier trial did not meet investor expectations.
data.description: Sanofi SA recently revealed findings from two worldwide phase 3 trials of amlitelimab, a novel antibody that targets OX40L for treating atopic dermatitis (AD). This drug is positioned as a potential successor to the popular eczema medication Dupixent. The studies showed promising results for amlitelimab in treating moderate-to-severe AD in patients aged 12 and above. The drug exhibited good tolerance and a safety profile in line with prior data. In September 2025, Sanofi’s COAST 1 phase 3 trial of amlitelimab didn't meet investor projections despite achieving all primary and key secondary goals. However, it demonstrated significant skin clearance and reduced disease severity compared to a placebo. The full details are accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: MORPHIT transforms construction waste into sustainable building material, reducing over 30% of EU waste and 40% global emissions.
data.description: In Hamburg, Germany on January 23, 2026, it was reported that the construction industry accounts for over 30% of the EU's waste and more than 40% of global emissions. The waste generated by this sector is complex to handle due to its varied composition of materials. This information highlights the significant environmental impact of the construction industry, emphasizing the urgent need for sustainable waste management practices.
The director of the Human Rights Commission's office in the Palestinian territories says 50 Palestinian children have been killed in attacks by settlers in the West Bank.

The Italian Foreign Minister believes that Zelensky in Davos did not express gratitude to Europeans for their help to Ukraine. Earlier, Zelensky, speaking at the WEF, criticized the EU, in particular, he accused Europeans of indecision in political matters.

data.title: Canopy Growth to share Q3 fiscal year 2026 results on Feb 6, 2026, CEO and CFO to host webcast at 10 AM ET.
data.description: Smiths Falls-based Canopy Growth Corporation, trading as WEED on the TSX and CGC on the NASDAQ, is set to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026 concluding on December 31, 2025. The financial results will be made public before the commencement of the financial markets on February 6, 2026. Subsequently, a live audio webcast featuring CEO Luc Mongeau and CFO Tom Stewart will be held on the same day at 10 AM Eastern Time in order to discuss the outcomes of the third quarter.

data.title: Spanish Mountain Gold hires Laura Stein from NY for investor communication. Veteran in mining industry. Email and social media used for communication.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Spanish Mountain Gold Ltd. (TSX-V: SPA) (FSE: S3Y) (OTCQB: SPAUF) has appointed Laura Stein from New York for managing shareholder and investor communications. With over 30 years of experience in the mining sector, Laura will engage with current shareholders, analysts, and potential investors via email and social media. This move aims to enhance transparency and strengthen relationships with stakeholders.

data.title: Cyclic Materials secures $75M funding to enhance rare earth supply globally through scrap recycling. Operating in US, Europe, and Canada.
data.description: A company called Cyclic Materials has recently concluded a Series C equity funding round, raising an impressive amount of over USD $75 million. This round marked their largest to date and saw significant oversubscription. The company is now looking to expand its operations in the US and Europe, while also ramping up its research and development efforts in Canada. Cyclic Materials specializes in recycling magnet-containing scrap from end-of-life products and waste from magnet production. This process allows for the production of rare earth elements (REEs) used in magnets, particularly heavy rare earth elements. Recycling these materials is considered the fastest way to acquire magnet REEs in Western countries, providing a unique opportunity for access to these valuable components.

data.title: Dow Jones futures drop due to Intel fall, but Nvidia sees boost in China. Tesla focuses on self-driving.
data.description: Stock market futures experienced a decline following a significant drop in Intel's stock value. However, there are indications that Nvidia's sales of H200 chips could potentially see a boost in China. Meanwhile, Tesla made headlines with major developments in its self-driving robotaxi technology. This news comes amidst the Dow Jones Futures slide, with Intel and Nvidia in focus, as well as Tesla's autonomous driving advancements.

data.title: Permian Resources Corp (NYSE: PR) to report Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 25, 2026; earnings call on Feb 26 at 9:00 am.
data.description: Midland, Texas-based Permian Resources Corporation (NYSE: PR) shared plans to release its financial and operational data for the fourth quarter and entire fiscal year of 2025 after the market closes on Wednesday, February 25, 2026. Following this, an earnings conference call will be held on Thursday, February 26, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Central Time (10:00 a.m. Eastern Time). Stakeholders can join the call by dialing (800) 549-8228.

data.title: ECARX (Nasdaq: ECX) to report Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb. 12, 2026. Results cover period ending Dec. 31, 2025.
data.description: London, 23rd January 2026 - A leading global mobility technology provider, ECARX Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ECX), has revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. The report is scheduled to be released before the U.S. market commences trading on Thursday, February.

data.title: NameSilo now manages over 6 million domains; added to CSE25 Index. Jan 23, 2026.
data.description: NameSilo Technologies Corp. has recently been included in the CSE25 Index on the Canadian Securities Exchange. This update was confirmed on January 23, 2026. NameSilo Technologies Corp., listed as CSE: URL and PINKSHEETS: URLOF, manages Namesilo LLC, a leading domain registrar.

data.title: Demand surges for portable quiet generators during U.S. East Coast winter storms; Erayak reports boost in sales.
data.description: In WENZHOU, China, Erayak Power Solution Group Inc. (Nasdaq: RAYA) shared insights on Jan. 23, 2026, about market demands in the United States. The Company, known for its power solution products, noted a significant increase in recent trends.

data.title: Peeyush Ranjan launches Fermi.ai, an AI-first edtech startup in US & India, revolutionizing high-school STEM education.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Fermi.ai, an AI-centered edtech startup based in Singapore, announced its initiative to revolutionize high school STEM education by offering customized learning experiences. The company has introduced its platform in the United States and India through its subsidiaries, marking the beginning of its global expansion efforts.

data.title: Team Velocity highlights platform integrations for auto dealers, improving site speed, reducing costs, and enhancing CX; addressing issues like pop-ups and fragmented systems.
data.description: An automotive industry technology provider, Team Velocity, based in Washington, is presenting its innovative platform integrations and partnerships aimed at aiding dealerships in offering quicker, easier, and more seamless experiences for their customers. By addressing issues such as excessive pop-ups and disjointed systems that hinder website performance and irritate users, Team Velocity has effectively tackled these obstacles. Their solutions focus on enhancing the overall customer experience for car buyers and dealers by streamlining processes and enhancing connectivity.

data.title: Corporación América Airports updates Armenia International Airports concession agreement; subsidiary AIA amends terms with GOA.
data.description: Corporación América Airports S.A. (NYSE: CAAP), a prominent private airport operator, shared that its subsidiary Armenia International Airports CJSC (“AIA”) has made an amendment agreement with the Government of the Republic of Armenia (“GOA”). AIA operates Zvartnots and Gyumri Shirak International Airports in Yerevan. The amendment aims to modify specific terms of the current concession agreement in place. This move signifies a strategic decision involving key stakeholders, impacting airport operations and partnerships in Armenia.
